parameters.query: SELECT st.id, st.site_url, st.country_code, st.proxy_url, st.proxy_type, st.timezone, st.accept_language, st.render_domain, st.block_uuids, st.extra_params, st.geozo_block_id, pc.di_login, pc.di_password, pc.di_host, pc.di_port FROM scan_targets st CROSS JOIN (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key='dataimpulse_login' THEN value END) as di_login, MAX(CASE WHEN key='dataimpulse_password' THEN value END) as di_password, MAX(CASE WHEN key='dataimpulse_host' THEN value END) as di_host, MAX(CASE WHEN key='dataimpulse_port' THEN value END) as di_port FROM bot_config WHERE category='proxy') pc WHERE st.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY st.country_code, st.site_url

WITH our_match AS (
  SELECT t.ad_id, (elem->>'position')::int AS pos
  FROM teasers t,
  jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.teasers).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb) elem
  WHERE t.ad_id IS NOT NULL
    AND t.ad_id::text = elem->>'media_id'
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO position_tracking (site_url, ad_id, position, total_teasers_in_block, competitor_titles)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  (SELECT ad_id FROM our_match),
  (SELECT pos FROM our_match),
  {{ $json.teasers_found }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ block_ids: $json.block_ids, teasers: $json.teasers, country_code: $json.country_code }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
);

INSERT INTO position_tracking (site_url, ad_id, position, total_teasers_in_block, competitor_titles)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  0,
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ widget_found: false, block_ids: [], country_code: $json.country_code, error: $json.error || "no widget" }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
);

VALUES ('https://example.com', 'KZ', 'socks5://user:pass@host:1080', 'socks5');

parameters.query: SELECT c.media_id, c.title, c.landing_url as destination_url, c.avg_cost as cost, c.last_seen_at, p.last_scanned as last_rechecked_at, 'creative' as source FROM creatives c LEFT JOIN (SELECT creative_id, MAX(scanned_at) as last_scanned FROM placements WHERE publisher_site = '{{ ($json.site_url.match(/^https?:\/\/[^/]+/) || [$json.site_url])[0].replace(/'/g, "''") }}' GROUP BY creative_id) p ON p.creative_id = c.id WHERE c.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT creative_id FROM placements WHERE publisher_site = '{{ ($json.site_url.match(/^https?:\/\/[^/]+/) || [$json.site_url])[0].replace(/'/g, "''") }}') UNION ALL SELECT ad_id as media_id, title, NULL as destination_url, NULL as cost, NULL as last_seen_at, NULL as last_rechecked_at, 'ours' as source FROM teasers WHERE ad_id IS NOT NULL

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S918B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.6261.64 Mobile Safari/537.36

parameters.query:
-- 1. Upsert creative (dedup by media_id, fallback to title)
WITH upserted_creative AS (
  INSERT INTO creatives (
    media_id, title, image_url, landing_url, landing_domain,
    short_description, full_description, button_text,
    geozo_ad_id, geozo_adgroup_id, geozo_site_id,
    avg_cost, avg_show_rate, avg_position,
    total_placements, days_running
  )
  SELECT
    {{ $json.media_id || 'NULL' }},
    '{{ ($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.image_url ? "'" + $json.image_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.landing_url && !['resolve_failed','blocked_by_antifraud'].includes($json.landing_url) ? "'" + $json.landing_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.landing_domain ? "'" + $json.landing_domain.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.short_description ? "'" + $json.short_description.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.full_description ? "'" + $json.full_description.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.button_text ? "'" + $json.button_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.geozo_ad_id || 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.geozo_adgroup_id || 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.geozo_site_id || 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.show_rate || 0 }},
    {{ $json.position || 0 }},
    1, 0
  WHERE '{{ ($json.title || "") }}' != '' AND '{{ ($json.title || "") }}' != 'undefined'
  ON CONFLICT (media_id) WHERE media_id IS NOT NULL
  DO UPDATE SET
    last_seen_at = NOW(),
    total_placements = creatives.total_placements + 1,
    image_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.image_url, creatives.image_url),
    landing_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.landing_url, creatives.landing_url),
    landing_domain = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.landing_domain, creatives.landing_domain),
    short_description = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.short_description, creatives.short_description),
    full_description = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.full_description, creatives.full_description),
    button_text = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.button_text, creatives.button_text),
    geozo_ad_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.geozo_ad_id, creatives.geozo_ad_id),
    geozo_adgroup_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.geozo_adgroup_id, creatives.geozo_adgroup_id),
    geozo_site_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.geozo_site_id, creatives.geozo_site_id),
    avg_cost = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.avg_cost IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((COALESCE(creatives.avg_cost,0) * 0.7 + EXCLUDED.avg_cost * 0.3)::numeric, 4) ELSE creatives.avg_cost END,
    avg_show_rate = ROUND((COALESCE(creatives.avg_show_rate,0) * 0.7 + EXCLUDED.avg_show_rate * 0.3)::numeric, 4),
    avg_position = CASE WHEN creatives.avg_position IS NULL THEN EXCLUDED.avg_position ELSE ROUND((creatives.avg_position * 0.7 + EXCLUDED.avg_position * 0.3)::numeric, 2) END,
    countries = CASE WHEN {{ $json.country_code ? "'" + $json.country_code + "'" : "NULL" }} IS NOT NULL AND NOT (creatives.countries @> ARRAY[{{ $json.country_code ? "'" + $json.country_code + "'" : "NULL" }}]::text[]) THEN creatives.countries || ARRAY[{{ $json.country_code ? "'" + $json.country_code + "'" : "NULL" }}]::text[] ELSE creatives.countries END,
    days_running = GREATEST(0, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - creatives.first_seen_at)::int)
  RETURNING id
),
found_creative AS (
  SELECT id FROM upserted_creative
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id FROM creatives WHERE media_id = {{ $json.media_id || 'NULL' }} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upserted_creative)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id FROM creatives WHERE media_id IS NULL AND title = '{{ ($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND {{ $json.media_id || 'NULL' }} IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upserted_creative)
  LIMIT 1
)
-- 2. Insert placement
, new_placement AS (
  INSERT INTO placements (creative_id, publisher_site, block_id, country_code, position, cost, show_rate, render_domain, click_url, scanned_at)
  SELECT fc.id, '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.country_code ? "'" + $json.country_code + "'" : "NULL" }}, {{ $json.position || 0 }}, {{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.show_rate || 0 }}, {{ $json.render_domain ? "'" + $json.render_domain.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}, {{ $json.click_url ? "'" + $json.click_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}, NOW()
  FROM found_creative fc
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM placements
    WHERE creative_id = fc.id
    AND publisher_site = '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND scanned_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
  )
  RETURNING creative_id
)
-- 3. Upsert daily stats
, daily AS (
  INSERT INTO creative_daily_stats (creative_id, stat_date, placements_count, unique_sites, avg_position, min_position, max_position, avg_cost, max_cost, avg_show_rate)
  SELECT np.creative_id, CURRENT_DATE, 1, 1, {{ $json.position || 0 }}, {{ $json.position || 0 }}, {{ $json.position || 0 }}, {{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.show_rate || 0 }}
  FROM new_placement np LIMIT 1
  ON CONFLICT (creative_id, stat_date) DO UPDATE SET
    placements_count = creative_daily_stats.placements_count + 1,
    avg_position = ROUND((creative_daily_stats.avg_position * creative_daily_stats.placements_count + {{ $json.position || 0 }})::numeric / (creative_daily_stats.placements_count + 1), 2),
    min_position = LEAST(creative_daily_stats.min_position, {{ $json.position || 0 }}),
    max_position = GREATEST(creative_daily_stats.max_position, {{ $json.position || 0 }}),
    avg_cost = CASE WHEN {{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }} IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((COALESCE(creative_daily_stats.avg_cost,0) * creative_daily_stats.placements_count + {{ $json.cost || 0 }})::numeric / (creative_daily_stats.placements_count + 1), 4) ELSE creative_daily_stats.avg_cost END,
    max_cost = CASE WHEN {{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }} IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(COALESCE(creative_daily_stats.max_cost,0), {{ $json.cost || 0 }}) ELSE creative_daily_stats.max_cost END,
    avg_show_rate = ROUND((creative_daily_stats.avg_show_rate * creative_daily_stats.placements_count + {{ $json.show_rate || 0 }})::numeric / (creative_daily_stats.placements_count + 1), 4)
)
SELECT 1;

-- Auto-cache geozo_block_id to scan_targets if discovered
UPDATE scan_targets SET geozo_block_id = {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 'NULL' }}
WHERE {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 0 }} > 0
  AND site_url LIKE '{{ ($json.site_url.match(/^https?:\/\/[^/]+/) || [$json.site_url])[0].replace(/'/g, "''") }}%'
  AND (geozo_block_id IS NULL OR geozo_block_id != {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 0 }});
SELECT CASE WHEN screenshot_path IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as already_captured FROM creatives WHERE landing_url = '{{ $json.landing_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $('Check Needs Capture').item.json.landing_url, proxy: $('Check Needs Capture').item.json.proxy_url || undefined }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE creatives SET screenshot_path = '{{ ($json.body.screenshot_path || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', archive_path = '{{ ($json.body.archive_path || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', captured_at = NOW() WHERE landing_url = '{{ ($('Check Needs Capture').item.json.landing_url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND screenshot_path IS NULL
